content_body: We relaxed in the hot tub and cooked smores over the campfire and went swimming in the river. We also enjoyed downtown Blue Ridge and the Toccoa Swinging Bridge. We also enjoyed lots of talking and drinking on the porch. One of our favorite moments was watching the three little ones playing in a beautiful setting, watching the dogs play and swim in the river and drinking coffee and reading on the decks. What a perfect home, SO beautiful and CLEAN. We are so enjoyed our time here and look forward to returning.
title: Beautiful Setting
